hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('AGENTS.md')) process.exit(0); const hasGraph=fs.existsSync('graphify-out/graph.json'); const systemMessage=hasGraph ? 'Vault-first repo. Read AGENTS.md, notes/README.md, notes/reference/index.md, then one task-specific reference note and one durable note before raw code. Use notes/reference/obsidian.md for vault rules and graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md only when architecture context matters.' : 'Vault-first repo. Read AGENTS.md, notes/README.md, notes/reference/index.md, then one task-specific reference note and one durable note before raw code. Use notes/reference/obsidian.md for vault rules. Build or read graphify only when architecture context matters.'; process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'allow'},systemMessage}));"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('AGENTS.md')) process.exit(0); const systemMessage='If the edit changed repo contracts, setup, or any reusable procedure, update the owning note in notes/ before you stop. Prefer notes/reference/ for canonical rules, notes/investigations/ for diagnosis, notes/runbooks/ for repeatable procedures, and notes/sessions/ only for short active handoffs.'; process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',permissionDecision:'allow'},systemMessage}));"
